docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $110.20 FILED BY SMITH, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT IMPERIAL PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
